hero.desc: PawMate is the app that connects pet owners with verified professional caregivers. Walks, pet sitting, daily care — all in one place.

about.label: About Us
about.desc: We are a young team that believes every pet deserves the best possible care. PawMate was born from the real need to connect busy owners with trusted caregivers in their area.
about.card1Desc: PawMate started as a personal project to help friends find trusted caregivers for their pets. Today, we're building a platform that makes responsible pet care easy.
about.card2Desc: We are developers, designers, and animal lovers. Every decision we make is guided by the well-being of pets and the peace of mind of their owners.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.desc: We want finding a trusted pet caregiver to be as easy as calling a cab. Safe, fast, and transparent.

future.label: Future Ideas
future.desc: We're working on new features to make the experience even better.
future.idea1Desc: A smart assistant that helps detect symptoms and recommends vet visits.
future.idea2Desc: Grooming, training, vets — all services for your pet in one place.
future.idea3Desc: Connect with smart collars to monitor health and activity in real time.

contact.label: Contact
contact.desc: We're here to help. Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

download.desc: Available for Android. Download the APK directly and try the app.

footer.desc: Connecting pets with the best care.
